svg.text: 1. Deterministic engine controls flow, agent does creative work
2. Harness > Model — the system around the LLM matters more
3. Every step has an eval gate — no unchecked output propagates
4. Context rot is the silent killer — Initializer cuts it at each step
5. Memory is maintenance, not storage — prune, resolve, validate
6. Start with human review, earn autonomy through eval data
7. Build for deletion — every component has an expiry condition
8. Cost: tier routing + caching + batch = -90% from naive baseline
